working_on: MemPalace adversarial review (Issue #35) — campaign session S-D of 7. First concrete application of ADR 0057's adversarial-stance posture (judging fit-to-CONTINUE, not fit-in-the-past).
outcome_summary: MemPalace adversarial review (Issue #35) closed via audit report at engine/docs/audits/mempalace-adversarial-review-S-0086.md. First concrete application of ADR 0057's adversarial-stance posture. Verdict: scale back. Forward-fit map decisive — Phase 6 / 7 / DEC.1 / OQ-CONTEXT-COMPRESSION / OQ-PEDAGOGY-INFERENCE-LOCUS specify Postgres + pgvector + ephemeral in-session summarization with zero MemPalace dependency in product runtime; engine-side core (decisions/lessons/problems/diary/well-targeted-search/hooks/probe) is load-bearing forward via ADR 0057 cadence-audit substrate + ADR 0051 routine-mode boot + two-layer decision recording. 8 numbered recommendations (R1–R8) authored for user adjudication per ADR 0057 element 1; ADR amendments and child Issues land downstream. Issues #38/#39/#40 remain open pending user adjudication. Cold-context probe target: ADR 0048 (random-pick); cold-read healthy. Validator at audit-report commit: 0 hard-fails; soft-warns at expected baseline (366 missing_rigor_score Phase-5 carryover, 11 issue_collision expected for in-scope MemPalace Issues, 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit pre-existing). Next: S-0087 cadence-fired audit becomes formal first-exercise of ADR 0057 per ADR 0053.
declared_scope: Author an adversarial-stance audit of MemPalace at engine/docs/audits/mempalace-adversarial-review-S-0086.md per Issue #35, applying ADR 0057's framework to evaluate fit-to-CONTINUE (forward) alongside fit-historically. Output: report with verdict, historical evidence table, forward-fit map, burden ledger, dual counterfactual, ≥1 retire-candidate-recommendation, cold-context probe, blank User-adjudication subsection. Closes #35. ADR amendments and child Issues (incl. dispositions for #38/#39/#40) are user-adjudicated downstream.
